entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, DIMINISHING TO AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS AROUND 70

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
